## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows the style guide (`cmake --build --target format` run cleanly)
- [ ] Added / updated tests covering the change
- [ ] Added / updated documentation in `docs/`

- [ ] For new devices: protocol notes committed under `docs/protocols/<family>/<model>.md`
- [ ] Signed off each commit (`git commit -s`)
